title: AVA [In rework]
description:
English
This mod adds a pencil that you can buy in the village, with it you can draw a hammer, you can also craft a bracelet that can give you a super weapon! dealing 14 damage
body:
# The mod is based on the Animation vs Animator series

The mod adds many things such as:
-  FlashPen
-  Red bracelet
-  Drawn objects
   
 The mod also adds structures and new achievements.

# MOD BELONGS TO AXOLOTL TEAM!

**Subscribe!**  
[![YouTube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d33b374c7b3a7b9b57f9d9b87afbe3b5976a8233.png)](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCEK28g9KlxEc2mMPmseTbgw)

**Join our Discord!**
